# atlassian_jira_status (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud status by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_status" "example" {
  name = "In Progress"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the status to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the status.
- `id` (String) The ID of the status.
- `status_category` (String) The category of the status: "TODO", "IN_PROGRESS", or "DONE".
